mapper.sql: tp.training_name, tp.training_method, tp.training_content, tp.training_purpose, tp.training_level, tp.profession_classify, tp.dependence_dept, tp.host_dept, tp.teacher, tp.employee_describes, tp.plan_date, tp.employee_quantity, tp.plan_money, tp.online_flag, tp.remark, tp.enabled_flag, tp.plan_status, tp.id, tp.create_time, tp.create_by, tp.update_time, tp.update_by,tp.training_no, tp.plan_charge_id, tp.dept_charge_id, tp.plan_type, tp.show_flag, tp.change_describes, tp.attribute1, tp.change_oa_order, tp.change_current_node, tp.change_current_person, tp.change_plan_date, tp.host_dept_id, tp.training_no

${tAlias}.training_name as ${tAlias}_training_name, ${tAlias}.training_method as ${tAlias}_training_method, ${tAlias}.training_content as ${tAlias}_training_content, ${tAlias}.training_purpose as ${tAlias}_training_purpose, ${tAlias}.training_level as ${tAlias}_training_level, ${tAlias}.profession_classify as ${tAlias}_profession_classify, ${tAlias}.dependence_dept as ${tAlias}_dependence_dept, ${tAlias}.host_dept as ${tAlias}_host_dept, ${tAlias}.teacher as ${tAlias}_teacher, ${tAlias}.employee_describes as ${tAlias}_employee_describes, ${tAlias}.plan_date as ${tAlias}_plan_date, ${tAlias}.employee_quantity as ${tAlias}_employee_quantity, ${tAlias}.plan_money as ${tAlias}_plan_money, ${tAlias}.online_flag as ${tAlias}_online_flag, ${tAlias}.remark as ${tAlias}_remark, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.plan_status as ${tAlias}_plan_status, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.plan_type as ${tAlias}_plan_type, ${tAlias}.plan_charge_id as ${tAlias}_plan_charge_id, ${tAlias}.dept_charge_id as ${tAlias}_dept_charge_id, ${tAlias}.dept_charge_work_card as ${tAlias}_dept_charge_work_card, ${tAlias}.plan_charge_work_card as ${tAlias}_plan_charge_work_card, ${tAlias}.show_flag as ${tAlias}_show_flag, ${tAlias}.change_describes as ${tAlias}_change_describes, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.change_oa_order as ${tAlias}_change_oa_order, ${tAlias}.change_current_node as ${tAlias}_change_current_node, ${tAlias}.change_current_person as ${tAlias}_change_current_person, ${tAlias}.change_plan_date as ${tAlias}_change_plan_date, ${tAlias}.host_dept_id as ${tAlias}_host_dept_id, ${tAlias}.training_no as ${tAlias}_training_no

select tp.training_name, tp.training_method, tp.training_content, tp.training_purpose, tp.training_level,tp.training_no, tp.profession_classify,tp.training_no, isnull(( select STUFF(( SELECT '，' + case when exists ( select DISTINCT dept_name from fnd_dept where enabled_flag = 1 and deleted_flag = 0 and dept_name = tpid.dept_name GROUP BY dept_name having count(1) > 1 ) then (select dept_name from fnd_dept where enabled_flag = 1 and deleted_flag = 0 and id = (select temp.parent_id from fnd_dept temp where temp.id = tpid.dept_id ) ) + '.' + tpid.dept_name else tpid.dept_name end FROM td_plan_implement_dept tpid where tpid.enabled_flag = 1 and tpid.plan_implement_id = tpi.id order by tpid.id FOR XML PATH ( '' )), 1, 1, '' ) ), tp.dependence_dept) as dependence_dept, isnull(( select fd_t.dept_name from fnd_dept fd_t where fd_t.id = tp.host_dept_id and fd_t.enabled_flag = 1 and fd_t.deleted_flag = 0 ), tp.host_dept) as host_dept, isnull(( select STUFF((( SELECT '，' + pe_t.name from td_plan_employee tpe join pm_employee pe_t on tpe.employee_id = pe_t.id and tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id and tpe.type = 'teacher' and tpe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_t.enabled_flag = 1 order by pe_t.id FOR XML PATH ( '' )) + isnull(( case when ( exists (select 1 from td_plan_employee tpe join pm_employee pe_t on tpe.employee_id = pe_t.id and tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id and tpe.type = 'teacher' and tpe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_t.enabled_flag = 1) and isnull(tpi.out_teacher, '') <> '' ) then '，' + tpi.out_teacher else case when isnull(tpi.out_teacher, '') <> '' then tpi.out_teacher end end ), '') ), 1, 1, '' ) ) , tp.teacher) as teacher, isnull(( select STUFF((( SELECT '，' + pe_t.name from td_plan_employee tpe join pm_employee pe_t on tpe.employee_id = pe_t.id and tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id and tpe.type = 'employee' and tpe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_t.enabled_flag = 1 order by pe_t.id FOR XML PATH ( '' )) + isnull(( case when( exists (select 1 from td_plan_employee tpe join pm_employee pe_t on tpe.employee_id = pe_t.id and tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id and tpe.type = 'employee' and tpe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_t.enabled_flag = 1 ) and isnull(tpi.out_emp, '') <> '' ) then '，' + tpi.out_emp else case when isnull(tpi.out_emp, '') <> '' then tpi.out_emp end end ), '') ), 1, 1, '' ) ), tp.employee_describes) as employee_describes, tp.plan_date, case when (select count(1) from td_plan_employee tpe where tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id and tpe.enabled_flag = 1 and tpe.type = 'employee') > 0 then (select count(1) from td_plan_employee tpe where tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id and tpe.enabled_flag = 1 and tpe.type = 'employee') else null end as total_employee_quantity, tp.employee_quantity, tp.plan_money, tp.online_flag, tp.remark, tp.enabled_flag, tp.plan_status, tp.id, tp.create_time, tp.create_by, tp.update_time, tp.update_by, tp.plan_charge_id, tp.dept_charge_id, tp.plan_type, tp.show_flag, tp.change_describes, tp.attribute1, tp.change_oa_order, tp.change_current_node, tp.change_current_person, tp.change_plan_date, tp.host_dept_id , isnull(pe.name, '') as dept_charge_name , isnull(pet.name, '') as plan_charge_name , isnull(pe.work_card, '') as dept_charge_work_card , isnull(pet.work_card, '') as plan_charge_work_card , (select top 1 isnull(fu.email, '') from fnd_user fu where fu.employee_id = pe.id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) as dept_charge_email , (select top 1 isnull(fu.email, '') from fnd_user fu where fu.employee_id = pet.id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) as plan_charge_email , tpi.plan_id as tpi_plan_id, tpi.begin_date as tpi_begin_date, tpi.end_date as tpi_end_date, tpi.training_time_quantity as tpi_training_time_quantity, tpi.training_address as tpi_training_address, tpi.check_method as tpi_check_method, tpi.training_money as tpi_training_money, tpi.request_by as tpi_request_by, tpi.request_date as tpi_request_date, tpi.current_node as tpi_current_node, tpi.current_person as tpi_current_person, tpi.oa_order as tpi_oa_order, tpi.enabled_flag as tpi_enabled_flag, tpi.approval_status as tpi_approval_status, tpi.out_teacher as tpi_out_teacher, tpi.out_emp as tpi_out_emp, tpi.id as tpi_id, tpi.create_time as tpi_create_time, tpi.create_by as tpi_create_by, tpi.update_time as tpi_update_time, tpi.update_by as tpi_update_by, case when exists (select 1 from td_plan_change_history tpch where tpch.parent_id = tp.id and tpch.change_type = 'implement') then 1 else 0 end as implement_order_flag from td_plan tp left join td_plan_implement tpi on tp.id = tpi.plan_id left join pm_employee pe on pe.id = tp.dept_charge_id left join pm_employee pet on pet.id = tp.plan_charge_id where tp.enabled_flag = 1 and tp.safety_training_flag = 0 and isnull(tpi.enabled_flag, 1) = 1 -- and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pet.enabled_flag = 1

if.if: and (tp.dept_charge_id = #{criteria.deptChargeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} or tp.plan_charge_id = #{criteria.planChargeId, jdbcType = BIGINT})

if.test: criteria.value != null and criteria.value != '' and criteria.colName != '' and criteria.symbol != ''
item.value != null and item.colValue != '' and item.symbol != ''

choose.when: and (select count(1) from td_plan_employee tpe where tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id and tpe.enabled_flag = 1 and tpe.type = 'employee') ${item.symbol} #{item.colValue, jdbcType = INTEGER}

mapper.insert: insert into td_plan (training_name, training_method, training_content, training_purpose, training_level, profession_classify, dependence_dept, host_dept, teacher, employee_describes, plan_date, employee_quantity, plan_money, online_flag, remark, enabled_flag, plan_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, plan_type, dept_charge_id,plan_charge_id, show_flag, host_dept_id,training_no ) values (#{trainingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingPurpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{professionClassify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dependenceDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hostDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teacher,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{planMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{onlineFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{planStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptChargeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planChargeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{showFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hostDeptId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, (select case when #{trainingMethod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} = '外派培训' then 'W' else case when #{trainingMethod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} = '引入内训' then 'Y' else 'N' end end + convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + right(cast('0' + convert(varchar(2), month(getdate())) as varchar), 2) + right(cast('0' + convert(varchar(2), day(getdate())) as varchar), 2) + right(cast('000' + isnull(convert(varchar(3), convert(int, (select top 1 right(training_no, 3) from td_plan where training_method = '外派培训' and year(create_time) = year(getdate()) order by id desc)) + 1), '1') as varchar), 3) ) )

if.if: and (tp.dept_charge_id = #{criteria.deptChargeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} or tp.plan_charge_id = #{criteria.planChargeId, jdbcType = BIGINT})

mapper.insert:
insert into td_plan (training_name, training_method, training_content, training_purpose, training_level, profession_classify, dependence_dept, host_dept, teacher, employee_describes, plan_date, employee_quantity, plan_money, online_flag, remark, enabled_flag, plan_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, plan_type, dept_charge_id,plan_charge_id, show_flag, training_no ) values( #{trainingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingPurpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{professionClassify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dependenceDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hostDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teacher,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{planMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{onlineFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, '待指定部门负责人',#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, '年度计划', null, null, 1, #{trainingNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
)

insert into td_plan (training_name, training_method, training_content, training_purpose, training_level, profession_classify, dependence_dept, host_dept, teacher, employee_describes, plan_date, employee_quantity, plan_money, online_flag, remark, enabled_flag, plan_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, plan_type, dept_charge_id,plan_charge_id, show_flag, training_no ) select tpi.training_name, tpi.training_method, tpi.training_content, tpi.training_purpose, tpi.training_level, tpi.profession_classify, tpi.dependence_dept, tpi.host_dept, tpi.teacher, tpi.employee_describes, tpi.plan_date, tpi.employee_quantity, tpi.plan_money, tpi.online_flag, tpi.remark, 1, '待指定部门负责人', tpi.create_time, tpi.create_by, tpi.update_time, tpi.update_by, '年度计划', null, null, 1,
'PX' + convert(varchar(4),year(getdate())) + convert(varchar(4), ROW_NUMBER() over(order by tpi.ID asc) + convert(int, right((select top 1 training_no from td_plan order by id desc ), 4)) )
from td_plan_interface tpi where tpi.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and tpi.data_status = 'T'
mapper.sql:
select
,
,
, isnull(pe.name, '') as dept_charge_name , isnull(pet.name, '') as plan_charge_name , isnull(pe.work_card, '') as dept_charge_work_card , isnull(pet.work_card, '') as plan_charge_work_card , (select top 1 isnull(fu.email, '') from fnd_user fu where fu.employee_id = pe.id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) as dept_charge_email , (select top 1 isnull(fu.email, '') from fnd_user fu where fu.employee_id = pet.id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) as plan_charge_email , case when (select count(1) from td_plan_result tpr_t where tpr_t.plan_id = tp.id and tpr_t.enabled_flag = 1 ) > 0 then (select count(1) from td_plan_result tpr_t where tpr_t.plan_id = tp.id and tpr_t.enabled_flag = 1 ) else null end as result_employee_quantity from td_plan tp left join pm_employee pe on pe.id = tp.dept_charge_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left join pm_employee pet on pet.id = tp.plan_charge_id and pet.enabled_flag = 1 left join td_plan_implement tpi on tpi.plan_id = tp.id and tpi.enabled_flag = 1 and tp.enabled_flag = 1 left join td_plan_check_method tpcm on tpcm.plan_implement_id = tpi.id and tpcm.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan(training_method, training_content, teacher, employee_quantity, safety_training_have_manager_flag, safety_start_date, safety_end_date, safety_training_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, safety_training_flag, training_name, plan_money, online_flag, enabled_flag, plan_status, show_flag ) values(#{trainingMethod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{trainingConten, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{teacher, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{employeeQuantity, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{safetyTrainingHaveManagerFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, #{safetyStartDate, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, #{safetyEndDate, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, #{safetyTrainingTime, jdbcType = DOUBLE}, #{createTime, jdbcType =TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{updateTime, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType = BIGINT}, 1, '安全培训', 0, 0, 1, '安全培训', 0)
mapper.update: update td_plan set training_method = #{trainingMethod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, training_content = #{trainingConten, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, teacher = #{teacher, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, employee_quantity = #{employeeQuantity, jdbcType = INTEGER}, safety_training_have_manager_flag = #{safetyTrainingHaveManagerFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, safety_start_date = #{safetyStartDate, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, safety_end_date = #{safetyEndDate, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, safety_training_time = #{safetyTrainingTime, jdbcType = DOUBLE}, update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType = BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag, jdbcType = BIT} where id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, dept_name, department from td_safety_training_dept where enabled_flag = 1
mapper.sql: select tp.id , tp.training_method, tp.training_content, tp.teacher, tp.employee_quantity, tp.safety_training_have_manager_flag, tp.safety_start_date, tp.safety_end_date, tp.safety_training_time, tp.create_time, tp.create_by, tp.update_time, tp.update_by, from td_plan tp where tp.enabled_flag = 1 and tp.safety_training_flag = 1

if.if: and tp.safety_start_date >= #{criteria.safetyStartDate, jdbcType =TIMESTAMP } and tp.safety_end_date <= #{criteria.safetyEndDate, jdbcType =TIMESTAMP }

if.test: criteria.value != null and criteria.value != '' and criteria.colName != '' and criteria.symbol != ''
